evals.name: create-new-learning-goal
evals.prompt: 我要学习 OpenClaw 技能开发，创建一个学习目标
evals.expected_output: 成功创建学习目标，生成课程结构，创建 .learn-system/goals.json 文件

assertions.name: directory_created
assertions.description: 验证 .learn-system/ 目录被创建

assertions.name: goals_file_created
assertions.description: 验证 .learn-system/goals.json 文件被创建

assertions.name: goal_structure_valid
assertions.description: 验证 goals.json 符合 JSON Schema

assertions.name: interactive_questions_asked
assertions.description: 验证系统询问了学习目的、当前水平、期望时长、学习侧重点等问题

evals.name: start-existing-course
evals.prompt: 我要学习 ai-tools-fundamentals 这门课程
evals.expected_output: 识别为现有课程，路由到 module-manager，开始学习，更新 progress.json

assertions.name: course_recognized
assertions.description: 验证系统识别出这是现有课程而非新学习目标

assertions.name: module_manager_routed
assertions.description: 验证请求被正确路由到 module-manager 模块

assertions.name: progress_updated
assertions.description: 验证 progress.json 被创建或更新

evals.name: view-learning-status
evals.expected_output: 显示所有学习目标的进度概览，包括已完成、进行中、暂停的课程

assertions.name: status_displayed
assertions.description: 验证显示了学习状态信息

assertions.name: progress_shown
assertions.description: 验证显示了课程进度信息

assertions.name: status_module_routed
assertions.description: 验证请求被正确路由到 status 模块

evals.name: create-bookmark
evals.prompt: 创建一个书签，记录关于 Tool Use 机制的疑问

assertions.name: bookmarks_file_created
assertions.description: 验证 .learn-system/bookmarks.json 文件被创建

assertions.name: bookmark_structure_valid
assertions.description: 验证 bookmarks.json 符合 JSON Schema

assertions.name: tools_module_routed
assertions.description: 验证请求被正确路由到 tools 模块

evals.name: refresh-cache
evals.prompt: 刷新 OpenClaw 的知识缓存
evals.expected_output: 成功更新课程知识缓存，生成或更新 .learn-system/cache/ 目录下的缓存文件

assertions.name: cache_directory_exists
assertions.description: 验证 .learn-system/cache/ 目录存在

assertions.name: cache_files_created
assertions.description: 验证缓存文件被创建

evals.name: switch-learning-goal
evals.prompt: 切换学习目标到另一个
evals.expected_output: 显示所有学习目标列表，允许用户选择并切换激活的目标，更新 goals.json 的 active_goal_id

assertions.name: goals_listed
assertions.description: 验证显示了学习目标列表

assertions.name: active_goal_updated
assertions.description: 验证 goals.json 的 active_goal_id 被更新

assertions.name: goal_tracker_routed
assertions.description: 验证请求被正确路由到 goal-tracker 模块

evals.name: pause-resume-goal
evals.expected_output: 将当前目标状态更新为 paused

assertions.name: goal_status_paused
assertions.description: 验证目标状态被更新为 paused

evals.name: view-bookmarks
evals.expected_output: 显示所有书签列表，包括书签内容、状态（进行中/已完成）、创建时间

assertions.name: bookmarks_listed
assertions.description: 验证显示了书签列表

assertions.name: bookmark_status_shown
assertions.description: 验证显示了每个书签的状态

evals.name: update-progress
evals.prompt: 更新当前学习进度，我已经完成了第一个模块
evals.expected_output: 更新 progress.json，标记第一个模块为已完成，计算总体进度百分比

assertions.name: progress_updated
assertions.description: 验证 progress.json 被更新

assertions.name: module_marked_complete
assertions.description: 验证第一个模块被标记为已完成

assertions.name: overall_progress_calculated
assertions.description: 验证总体进度百分比被计算

evals.name: complete-bookmark
evals.prompt: 完成这个书签：Tool Use 机制的疑问
evals.expected_output: 将指定书签标记为已完成，更新书签状态

assertions.name: bookmark_completed
assertions.description: 验证书签被标记为已完成

assertions.name: bookmark_status_updated
assertions.description: 验证书签状态被更新

evals.name: view-goals-list
evals.expected_output: 列出所有学习目标（激活、暂停、已完成、归档），显示每个目标的基本信息和状态

assertions.name: all_goals_listed
assertions.description: 验证列出了所有学习目标

assertions.name: goal_status_shown
assertions.description: 验证显示了每个目标的状态

assertions.name: goal_tracker_routed
assertions.description: 验证请求被正确路由到 goal-tracker 模块

evals.name: intent-routing-new-topic
evals.prompt: 我想学 Docker 容器技术
evals.expected_output: 识别为新学习领域，路由到 goal-creator 模块，开始创建学习目标的流程

assertions.name: new_topic_recognized
assertions.description: 验证识别为新学习领域

assertions.name: goal_creator_routed
assertions.description: 验证被路由到 goal-creator 模块

assertions.name: goal_creation_started
assertions.description: 验证开始创建学习目标的流程

evals.name: intent-routing-existing-course
evals.expected_output: 识别为现有课程（如果存在），路由到 module-manager 模块，开始学习

assertions.name: existing_course_checked
assertions.description: 验证检查了课程是否已存在

assertions.name: module_manager_routed
assertions.description: 验证被路由到 module-manager 模块

evals.name: negative-trigger-bug-learning
evals.prompt: 学习这个 bug 的原因，看看为什么代码会出错
evals.expected_output: 不应该触发 learn-system-openclaw 技能，或触发后能正确识别为非学习目标场景并优雅退出

assertions.name: no_false_positive
assertions.description: 验证没有误触发学习系统技能

assertions.name: graceful_exit
assertions.description: 验证优雅地退出或拒绝

evals.name: edge-case-empty-input
evals.expected_output: 识别为不完整的输入，提示用户输入学习主题，而不是创建空的目标或报错

assertions.name: incomplete_input_detected
assertions.description: 验证识别出不完整的输入

assertions.name: prompt_for_topic
assertions.description: 验证提示用户输入学习主题

assertions.name: no_empty_goal_created
assertions.description: 验证没有创建空的目标

evals.name: export-learning-package
evals.prompt: 导出我的学习包，包含所有的学习目标、进度和书签
evals.expected_output: 成功导出学习包，生成符合 learning-package.schema.json 的 JSON 文件

assertions.name: package_file_created
assertions.description: 验证学习包文件被创建（*.learning-package.json）

assertions.name: package_schema_valid
assertions.description: 验证学习包符合 learning-package.schema.json

assertions.name: package_contains_goals
assertions.description: 验证学习包包含 goals 数据

assertions.name: package_contains_courses
assertions.description: 验证学习包包含 courses 数据

assertions.name: package_contains_cache
assertions.description: 验证学习包包含 cache 数据

evals.name: import-learning-package
evals.expected_output: 成功验证并导入学习包，创建或更新 goals.json、progress.json、bookmarks.json 和缓存文件

assertions.name: package_validated
assertions.description: 验证学习包符合 schema

assertions.name: goals_imported
assertions.description: 验证 goals.json 被导入或更新

assertions.name: courses_imported
assertions.description: 验证课程缓存被导入

assertions.name: import_success_message
assertions.description: 验证显示导入成功信息

evals.name: json-schema-validation
evals.prompt: 验证 .learn-system/goals.json 是否符合 JSON Schema
evals.expected_output: 验证 goals.json 是否符合 schemas/goals.schema.json

assertions.name: schema_validation_performed
assertions.description: 验证执行了 JSON Schema 验证

assertions.name: validation_result_reported
assertions.description: 验证报告验证结果
